Patch Set 4: Code-Review-1

(9 comments)

I think the test is pretty reasonable, but I think it would be better to re-use the test infrastructure in conf-sanity test_32, since it does a lot more thorough testing that the restored filesystem is working correctly.

One option, instead of saving an extra set of tarballs for the test image, is to create the tarballs from one of the existing disk* filesystems, and then restore it to the new filesystem.  This will also verify that the backup procedure is working correctly.
